c:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DATA_DIR"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Root data directory for database files"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_MAX_ITEMS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"10000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum items in Working Memory"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_WM_TTL_HOURS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"24"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Time-to-live for Working Memory entries (hours)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EP_LIMIT"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"50000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum items in Episodic Memory"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_BATCH"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"5000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Number of items to process per sleep cycle"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SP_MAX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"1000"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum scratchpad entries"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_RECENCY_HALFLIFE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"168.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recency decay half-life in hours (default = 1 week)"}]]}]]}]]}]
d:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Embeddings"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384 dimensions) for local embedding generation. No external API key is needed."]}]
f:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Vector quantization type (e.g. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"int8"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"float32"}],")"]}]]}]}]]}]
10:["$","h3",null,{"children":"Local LLM (for Sleep Summarization)"}]
11:["$","p",null,{"children":"The sleep cycle can use a local LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory."}]
12:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable/disable LLM-based summarization"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_MAX_TOKENS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"256"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Maximum tokens for generated summaries"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_N_THREADS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"4"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Number of CPU threads for inference"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_N_CTX"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"2048"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Context window size for the local model"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_REPO"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hugging Face repository for the local LLM"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_FILE"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"GGUF model filename within the repo"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"External OpenAI-compatible API base URL (alternative to local LLM)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_API_KEY"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API key for the external LLM endpoint"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_MODEL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Model name for the external LLM endpoint"}]]}]]}]]}]
13:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1b",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"No External Dependencies Required"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne runs entirely locally. Embeddings use fastembed with ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," (384 dims), and the sleep cycle uses a local LLM via llamafile or an optional external OpenAI-compatible endpoint. No OpenAI API key is required for basic usage."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
